title: onobrychis citrinoides
intro: Onobrychis citrinoides, also known as the yellow sainfoin or citrine sainfoin, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and antiviral properties. Onobrychis citrinoides can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies.
